title: IBKR Tax Calculator
description: A web application for calculating taxes from Interactive Brokers statements (CSV and HTML formats), tailored for Bulgarian users. All data is processed locally in the browser — no server storage, no tracking.

title: Djagi.com
description: A Bulgarian multiplayer browser games platform featuring 20+ games including Billiards, Belot, Chess, and Texas Hold'em. Worked as a full-stack developer from 2013 to 2018, contributing to the launch of multiple games and maintaining platform features, real-time multiplayer, and overall user experience.
